languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, ваш клинок рассыпался в руках гнусного вора! Виновный казнен. Готов понести наказание за дурные вести".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, ваш клинок рассыпался в руках гнусного вора! Виновный казнен. Готов понести наказание за дурные вести".

languages.text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, ваш клинок рассыпался в руках гнусного вора! Виновный казнен. Готов понести наказание за дурные вести".

traits.locale_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."
"Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."
"Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

languages.text: "Eure Lordschaft, Eure Klinge ist in die Hände eines gemeinen Diebes gefallen. Der Schuldige wurde exekutiert. Ich akzeptiere meine Strafe als Überbringer dieser schlechten Nachricht."
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Lordschaft, Eure Klinge ist in die Hände eines gemeinen Diebes gefallen. Der Schuldige wurde exekutiert. Ich akzeptiere meine Strafe als Überbringer dieser schlechten Nachricht."

languages.text: “大人，您的宝剑落入了一个卑鄙小贼之手！那犯人已被处决。我甘愿为带来这个坏消息接受惩罚。”
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: “大人，您的宝剑落入了一个卑鄙小贼之手！那犯人已被处决。我甘愿为带来这个坏消息接受惩罚。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, votre lame est tombée aux mains d'un vil criminel ! Le coupable a été exécuté. J'accepte le châtiment que vous jugerez approprié pour vous avoir apporté ces terribles nouvelles. »
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, votre lame est tombée aux mains d'un vil criminel ! Le coupable a été exécuté. J'accepte le châtiment que vous jugerez approprié pour vous avoir apporté ces terribles nouvelles. »

languages.text: «¡Milord, su espada había caído en manos de un vil ladrón! El interfecto ha sido ejecutado. Acepto mi castigo por traerle tan malas nuevas».
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: «¡Milord, su espada había caído en manos de un vil ladrón! El interfecto ha sido ejecutado. Acepto mi castigo por traerle tan malas nuevas».

languages.text: "Lord Hazretleri, kılıcınız aşağılık bir hırsızın eline geçmişti! Suçlu idam edildi. Bu kötü haberi getirdiğim için cezamı kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Hazretleri, kılıcınız aşağılık bir hırsızın eline geçmişti! Suçlu idam edildi. Bu kötü haberi getirdiğim için cezamı kabul ediyorum."

languages.text: 「殿、お刀は悪党に奪われておりました。犯人は処刑済みです。この悪い知らせを伝える身として罰を受けます」
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, your blade had fallen into the hands of a vile thief! The culprit has been executed. I accept my punishment for bearing these bad tidings."

traits.locale_text: 「殿、お刀は悪党に奪われておりました。犯人は処刑済みです。この悪い知らせを伝える身として罰を受けます」
